tasks.description: Initialize and retrieve the CIO baseline portfolio, define constraints, and set success criteria for the optimization program. Establish the documentation framework for tracking changes and evidence.

subtasks.description: Call get_initial_portfolio_dict to retrieve the baseline Consumer Staples long/short portfolio (expected: 34 tickers; 17 longs including CASY, CELH at 10% conviction; 17 shorts including WBA, PEP). Capture the exact one-line portfolio_dict string for downstream tools. Verify JSON style: all keys and string values double-quoted, numbers unquoted, no trailing commas.
completion_evidence: Raw portfolio_dict captured exactly on one line
Ticker counts by side (longs, shorts) recorded

subtasks.description: Compute portfolio gross and net exposure from convictions and long/short flags. Confirm initial compliance targets for later comparison: final portfolio must have 15–20 longs and 10–15 shorts, with net exposure ~+30%.
completion_evidence: Gross exposure (%) and net exposure (%) documented
Count of longs and shorts documented

subtasks.description: Define quantitative success criteria for optimization: measurable reduction in VaR and ES vs baseline; reduced top-name Component Total Risk (CTR%) concentration; improved drawdown profile (lower max DD and Ulcer Index); diversified structure (fewer correlation clusters > 0.70); survivable stress test losses under worst scenarios; maintain net exposure near +30% with 15–20 longs and 10–15 shorts; preserve or improve alpha thesis informed by market research.
completion_evidence: Success metric thresholds and comparison framework written

subtasks.description: Set up change-log schema to document every modification from initial to final: ticker, action (increase allocation|decrease allocation|drop position), amount (for increases/decreases), and precise risk rationale (e.g., correlation clustering, volatility management, diversification benefit).
completion_evidence: Change-log template created and ready to populate

observations: Tool 'create_structured_plan' returned: {'success': True, 'plan': {'tasks': [{'id': 1, 'description': 'Initialize and retrieve the CIO baseline portfolio, define constraints, and set success criteria for the optimization program. Establish

tasks.description: Run the mandatory baseline risk suite on the initial portfolio in the strict sequence to establish reference metrics.

subtasks.description: Run vol_es(portfolio_dict) with defaults (horizon_days=1, conf=0.99, method="param") to establish VaR, ES, and volatility baseline. Record values for comparison across iterations.
completion_evidence: Documented daily VaR, ES, and volatility with parameters used

subtasks.description: Run risk_contribution(portfolio_dict, metric="vol") to compute Total Risk, Marginal and Component Total Risk (CTR%) by asset. Identify top risk contributors and any outsized concentrations.
completion_evidence: List of top 5 CTR% contributors with percentages

subtasks.description: Run risk_contribution(portfolio_dict, metric="var") to assess tail-risk attribution and cross-validate concentration under VaR-based lens.
Run drawdown_profile(portfolio_dict) to quantify historical downside: maximum drawdown, average drawdown, Ulcer Index, and recovery periods.
completion_evidence: Max DD (%), Ulcer Index, average DD, recovery stats captured

subtasks.description: Run calculate_correlation_matrix(portfolio_dict) to identify clusters and pairs with correlation > 0.70 (concentration risk) and < 0.30 (diversification opportunities).
completion_evidence: Cluster map summary with high-correlation groups and low-correlation candidates

subtasks.description: Run calculate_covariance_matrix(portfolio_dict) to obtain absolute co-movement structure for use in any sizing optimization and hedge ratio thinking.

Run stress_test(portfolio_dict) to evaluate resilience under market crash (-20%/-30%/-40%), sector rotation, interest-rate shock, inflation spike, and correlation breakdown. Capture scenario impacts, VaR confirmation, and worst-case drawdowns.
completion_evidence: Any breach of acceptable loss thresholds

subtasks.description: Synthesize the baseline: summarize key vulnerabilities (e.g., top risk contributors, correlation clusters, weak stress scenarios) to inform the first modification set.
completion_evidence: Written baseline risk summary with prioritized issues list

tasks.description: Perform market context and fundamentals research to guide risk-aware alpha positioning and validate quantitative signals.

subtasks.description: Formulate research queries on Consumer Staples macro outlook, inflation trajectory, interest-rate expectations, input cost pressures (commodities), consumer spending trends, and sub-sector dynamics (beverages, household products, food retail).
Use free_search to gather current market narratives and risks; prioritize reputable sources and recent data. Extract implications for demand elasticity, pricing power, and margin durability.
completion_evidence: Bullet synthesis of macro and sector insights with risk angles

tasks.description: Construct Portfolio Iteration 1 with targeted modifications to address baseline vulnerabilities while aligning with market context. Validate with full risk suite.

subtasks.description: Identify over-concentrated names (high CTR%), high-volatility exposures needing sizing discipline, and correlation clusters (>0.70) to break. Select candidates for decrease allocation or drop position. Identify low-correlation, strong-quality names to increase allocation.
completion_evidence: Shortlist of decrease/drop and increase candidates with rationale

subtasks.description: Draft actionable suggestions for Iteration 1: for each impacted ticker, specify action (increase allocation|decrease allocation|drop position) and precise amount (e.g., 0.015). Include quantitative rationale (correlation, CTR%, vol) and qualitative context (pricing power, catalysts).
completion_evidence: Action list with amounts and reasons, ready to apply

subtasks.description: Construct the new portfolio_dict for Iteration 1 on a single line following exact JSON-style rules (double quotes for keys/strings; numbers unquoted; no trailing commas). Ensure weights reflect proposed changes and sum logically for gross and target net.
Validate constraints: 15–20 longs, 10–15 shorts, and net exposure near +30%. Use calculator to confirm totals. Adjust micro-sizing if needed without violating proposed directional tilts.
completion_evidence: Counts and net exposure documented; adjustments noted if any

subtasks.description: Run the full risk suite on Iteration 1 in order: vol_es (defaults), risk_contribution (metric="vol" then metric="var"), drawdown_profile, calculate_correlation_matrix, calculate_covariance_matrix, stress_test. Record all key metrics.

Compare Iteration 1 vs baseline: quantify improvements or regressions across VaR/ES, CTR% concentration, drawdowns, correlation clusters, and stress survivability. Note trade-offs impacting alpha potential.
completion_evidence: Side-by-side comparison summary with numeric deltas

subtasks.description: Decision checkpoint: If risk targets not met, mark gaps to inform Iteration 2 changes; otherwise, proceed to validation. Document the decision and reasoning.

tasks.description: Construct Portfolio Iteration 2 with refined modifications based on Iteration 1 outcomes. Re-run full validation and compare.

subtasks.description: Propose second-round actionable suggestions targeting remaining concentration, volatility pockets, or under-hedged macro sensitivities. Specify increase/decrease/drop with amounts.
completion_evidence: Iteration 2 action list with amounts and reasons

subtasks.description: Build Iteration 2 one-line portfolio_dict with exact formatting. Verify counts and net exposure (~+30%) using calculator.
